name: Dipped Spam Swiss Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into 12 slices (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer SPAM and cheese on 6 bread slices; top with remaining bread slices.
2. In a shallow bowl, beat together eggs and milk.
3. Dip both sides of each sandwich in the egg mixture.
4. In a griddle or skillet, grill sandwiches over medium heat until browned and cheese is melted. Turn once.
5. Serve with strawberry cream cheese.
